description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a large green lawn and mature trees providing shade and privacy. The structure features a flat roof, clean lines, and a mix of white and earth-toned exterior walls, with large windows that allow natural light to flood the interior. The front of the bungalow includes a driveway leading to a covered carport, and a small patio area is visible near the entrance. The backyard is spacious, with a swimming pool and landscaped garden, offering ample outdoor living space. The property is bordered by hedges and fencing, ensuring separation from neighboring lots. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a carport, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and mature trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from an angle highlighting the front driveway, carport, and dense tree coverage at the front and side.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a direct front view, emphasizing the carport, main entrance, and the pool area in the backyard.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the bungalow, focusing on the backyard, pool, and the open green lawn.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the bungalow from the back, with the expansive lawn and rear garden area most visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
